_note: Trimmed from real https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/{orcid-id}/works pulls for two CHPS faculty ORCID profiles. Save as tests/fixtures/orcid/sample-works.json. Each entry below is a `group` object (not a work-summary) — this is the level getOrcidWorks() should iterate and dedupe at.

group._case: in-window, single work-summary, DOI present, type=journal-article — the common/expected case

title.value: Development and Reliability of 2 Visual-Cognitive Dual-Task Agility Assessments for Return to Sport

group._case: DUPLICATE WORK-SUMMARIES within one group, same DOI — must dedupe to ONE candidate, not two. One asserted by Crossref, one by the publisher (MDPI) directly.

title.value: A Comparison of Methods for Tracking Muscle Quality During Early-Phase Rehabilitation Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction

journal-title.value: Journal of Functional Morphology and Kinesiology

title.value: A Comparison of Methods for Tracking Muscle Quality During Early-Phase Rehabilitation Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction

journal-title.value: Journal of Functional Morphology and Kinesiology

group._case: in-window, type=preprint, DOI present, journal-title is null — expect title/DOI to resolve via Crossref, no journal metadata from ORCID itself

title.value: TEST-RETEST RELIABILITY OF MOTOR UNIT FIRING BEHAVIOR DURING MAXIMAL GRIP STRENGTH ASSESSMENTS AMONG OLDER ADULTS

group._case: CONFIRMED REAL EDGE CASE: type=annotation on a genuine, DOI-bearing, published journal article. Must NOT be excluded by a type allowlist. Also out-of-window under a 3-year lookback (2024) if the cutoff year is 2026 — kept here to also exercise the year-boundary test.

title.value: Changing Attitudes Towards Research Through a Course-based Undergraduate Research Experience

journal-title.value: Journal of the Scholarship of Teaching and Learning

group._case: DOI-ABSENT, only a `wosuid` external-id, no journal DOI at all, AND well outside any reasonable lookback window (2017) — should be skipped by the year bound before Crossref is even attempted; title-fallback path is exercised separately by cases with a DOI removed

title.value: Vastus Lateralis Motor Unit Firing Rate Statistics During Fatigue In Younger Versus Older Adults

group._case: in-window, no DOI present at all (only pmid) — exercises the DOI-absent, title-fallback resolution path for a RECENT work, distinct from the old wosuid-only case above

title.value: We Don't Know our Own Strength: A Survey of Strength Training Attitudes, Behaviors and Knowledge in Physical Therapists and Physical Therapist Students.

work-summary._note: publication-date year artificially bumped to 2026 in this fixture (real record was 2021) purely so this case falls INSIDE a 3-year lookback window for testing purposes — see _case description
